## The pipeline at a glance

```
Setup       →  Phase 1 (Foundation)  →  Phase 2 (Interactions)  →  Phase 3 (Launch)
   ↓               ↓                          ↓                          ↓
Repo + CI    Static site,              Animations live,            Production-ready,
+ Vercel     deployed to preview       signature moments shipped   audited, deployed
```

Each phase ships independently. Each phase has its own file (`phase-1.md`, `phase-2.md`, `phase-3.md`) with sequential, executable prompts.

---

## Setup (pre-Phase 1)

These tasks happen once, before Phase 1 begins:

1. Repo creation (`git init`, push to GitHub).
2. Framework scaffold (`pnpm create next-app ...`).
3. Vercel project linked.
4. CI: GitHub Actions workflow runs lint + typecheck + Playwright a11y test on every PR.
5. Branch protections: main requires PR + CI green.
6. Run `scripts/init-project.py "<project>"` to create the `blueprint/`, `research/`, `qa/`, `decisions/` output folders and the initial `memory.md`.

---

## Phase 1 — Foundation

**Goal:** Site is structurally complete, deployed to preview, no animations.

**Deliverable:** `phase-1.md` (the executable recipe).

**Steps (high-level):**

1. Configure design tokens (colors, type, spacing) into the framework's config (Tailwind config or CSS variables).
2. Build the component library per `blueprint/wireframes.md`.
3. Assemble every page using the components.
4. Populate copy from `blueprint/sitemap.md` and `blueprint/wireframes.md`.
5. Add basic SEO (meta tags, og: tags per page).
6. Add accessibility scaffolding (semantic landmarks, skip-link, focus styles).
7. Deploy preview.

**Success criteria:**

- [ ] All pages exist at the URLs from `sitemap.md`.
- [ ] All pages render correctly on mobile (375px) and desktop (1280px).
- [ ] No console errors.
- [ ] Lighthouse mobile Performance ≥ 90 (no JS animations yet).
- [ ] Lighthouse mobile Accessibility ≥ 90.
- [ ] Keyboard-navigable; skip-link present.
- [ ] Site deployed and visible at a preview URL.

---

## Phase 2 — Interactions

**Goal:** Animations and signature moments live.

**Deliverable:** `phase-2.md` (the executable recipe).

**Steps (high-level):**

1. Install motion libraries from `tech-stack.md`.
2. Configure Lenis (or chosen smooth-scroll) globally with reduced-motion bypass.
3. Implement entrance choreography per page (per `blueprint/animations.md`).
4. Implement scroll-triggered reveals across sections (default pattern).
5. Implement the signature section per page (the deepest work).
6. Implement micro-interactions (button hover, link hover, input focus, card hover).
7. Implement page transitions.
8. Implement reduced-motion branches for every animation.
9. Deploy preview.

**Success criteria:**

- [ ] Every animation in `animations.md` is implemented.
- [ ] Every animation has a reduced-motion alternative that is tested.
- [ ] Lighthouse mobile Performance still ≥ 90.
- [ ] No janking visible on the Pixel 6a profile.
- [ ] Page transitions feel intentional.
- [ ] Keyboard navigation still works through every animated section.

---

## Phase 3 — Launch

**Goal:** Production-ready. All gates green. Deployed to canonical domain.

**Deliverable:** `phase-3.md` (the executable recipe).

**Steps (high-level):**

1. Run `scripts/audit-perf.py <preview-url>` (mobile + desktop). Fix any category below its floor in `web-claw/references/budgets.yaml -> lighthouse.{mobile,desktop}.*`.
2. axe-core a11y audit; fix all violations.
3. Cross-browser test (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, mobile Safari, Chrome Android).
4. Cross-device test (8 breakpoints minimum).
5. SEO finalization: sitemap.xml, robots.txt, og:image per page, structured data.
6. Real content swap-in (replace any placeholder).
7. Forms wired to backend (Resend / Formspree / API route).
8. Analytics wiring.
9. Security headers (CSP, Referrer-Policy, X-Content-Type-Options, Permissions-Policy).
10. Domain DNS + SSL.
11. Production deploy.

**Success criteria** (numeric thresholds derive from `web-claw/references/budgets.yaml`):

- [ ] All four Lighthouse mobile categories meet `budgets.yaml → lighthouse.mobile.*` floors.
- [ ] CWV pass on the deployed preview per `budgets.yaml → core_web_vitals.*`.
- [ ] axe-core: 0 critical and 0 serious violations (per `budgets.yaml → accessibility.*`).
- [ ] Keyboard golden path tested.
- [ ] Screen reader spot-check passed on home.
- [ ] Reduced-motion experience reviewed.
- [ ] Site loads correctly in: Chrome, Safari, Firefox, mobile Safari (real device), Chrome Android (real device).
- [ ] Security headers verified at https://securityheaders.com (score ≥ A).
- [ ] Forms tested end-to-end.
- [ ] Analytics events firing.
- [ ] Site live at canonical domain.

---

## Dependencies between phases

Phase 2 depends on:
- Phase 1 complete and deployed (preview URL).
- `blueprint/animations.md` signed off.
- `research/` complete.

Phase 3 depends on:
- Phase 2 complete and deployed.
- All copy finalized.
- Real assets (logos, photography) available.

If any of those aren't true when a phase starts, document the gap before proceeding.

---

## Risks and mitigations

| Risk                                                | Mitigation                                                                |
|-----------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Signature section misses 60fps on mobile            | Spec includes fallback to static images; if perf fails, switch automatically. |
| Custom font fails to load on first visit            | `font-display: swap` + fallback metrics matched via `size-adjust`.        |
| Copy isn't ready by Phase 3                         | Phase 1 ships with explicit `<!-- TODO -->` markers; Phase 3 gates on copy. |
| Real content (photos) larger than budget            | Pipeline: AVIF conversion + responsive srcset script in `scripts/`.       |
